t-1.notes: feature: Configuration · Remote.AuthScheme/ProjectID + KnownHostProviders gitlab @ internal/project/remote.go · gitlab.com→gitlab autodetect, /api/v4 derivation, auth_scheme/project_id config fields

t-2.notes: feature: Shipping / pull requests · openGitLabPR @ internal/ship/open.go · GitLab MR via REST (source/target_branch, Draft: prefix, web_url→URL/iid→Number), gitlabProjectRef (%2F or numeric id) + gitlabAuthHeader (PRIVATE-TOKEN|Bearer) helpers, username→id reviewer resolution non-fatal

t-3.notes: feature: Shipping / pull requests · ship.md §5/§6 GitLab @ assets/prompts/ship.md · pipeline-status-mapping CI watch (success/failed/canceled, keep-polling, manual/skipped ask, empty-pipelines) + squash-merge with should_remove_source_branch, guarded by TestShipPromptGitLabSections

t-4.notes: feature: Configuration · doctor remote checks @ internal/cmd/doctor.go · doctor accepts a gitlab remote (origin/auth_env validated, not rejected) + flags an invalid auth_scheme; telemetry classifies 'gitlab backend' as provider not other

t-5.notes: feature: Issue board sync · provider-aware forge.Client @ internal/forge/forge.go · New() returns a gitlab backend (not ErrNotImplemented); /projects/<ref> paths, PRIVATE-TOKEN/Bearer auth, iid/description/state_event/comma-label shapes, opened→open; issue enable + openBoard accept gitlab

t-6.notes: feature: Shipping / pull requests · postGitLabComment @ internal/ship/comment.go · posts an MR note via /projects/<ref>/merge_requests/<iid>/notes reusing gitlabProjectRef/gitlabAuthHeader (PRIVATE-TOKEN|Bearer); PRNumber=MR iid

t-7.notes: feature: Shipping / pull requests · buildOpenOpts/buildCommentOpts @ internal/cmd/ship.go · extract testable opts builders threading remote.auth_scheme/project_id onto OpenOpts/CommentOpts so the gitlab ship+comment path carries the user's overrides
